title: ageratina henzium
intro: Ageratina henzium, also known as Eupatorium henryi, is a perennial herb native to the mountainous regions of East Asia, belonging to the family Asteraceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiviral activities. Ageratina henzium has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, which is often used to treat various health conditions.
